# Kashi Dharshan — Teerth Yatra Tour Operator

> Kashi Dharshan is a pilgrimage (teerth yatra) tour operator based in Ayodhya, Uttar Pradesh, India. We provide guided, fully-managed darshan tour packages across the eight holiest cities of Uttar Pradesh — including hotels/dharamshala stays, private AC travel, knowledgeable guides, pooja arrangements, and VIP / sugam (fast-track) darshan. Rated 4.9/5 by 12,000+ pilgrims.

## Key facts
- Business type: Pilgrimage / teerth yatra tour operator (travel agency)
- Based in: Near Kashi Vishwanath Temple, Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India
- Phone & WhatsApp: +91 74087 63401
- Email: kashidharshannn@gmail.com
- Hours: Open daily 7:00 am – 9:00 pm; 24×7 on-yatra support
- Cities covered: Ayodhya, Varanasi (Kashi), Prayagraj, Chitrakoot, Naimisharanya, Vindhyachal, Mathura, Vrindavan
- Rating: 4.9/5 from 12,000+ pilgrims · 15 years of service

## Tour packages (starting price, per person)
- Kashi Dharshan Tour Package — 3 days / 2 nights — from ₹8,900
- Ayodhya Varanasi Tour Package — 4 days / 3 nights — from ₹13,900
- Ayodhya Prayagraj Varanasi Tour Package — 5 days / 4 nights — from ₹18,500
- Ayodhya Prayagraj Chitrakoot Varanasi Tour Package — 6 days / 5 nights — from ₹24,900
- Full Sacred Circuit Tour Package — 8 days / 7 nights — from ₹32,900
- Mathura Vrindavan Tour Package — 3 days / 2 nights — from ₹11,200
- All packages are customisable by dates, group size and comfort level.

## What's included in packages
- Accommodation (hotels or clean dharamshalas) close to the temples
- All inter-city and local travel by private AC vehicle, with pickup & drop
- Knowledgeable pandit-guides and darshan assistance
- VIP / sugam (fast-track) darshan where officially available
- Pooja & ritual arrangements; senior & wheelchair assistance

## Frequently asked questions
- How much does an Kashi Dharshan tour package cost? From ₹8,900 per person for a 3-day / 2-night package; price varies with hotel category, group size and season.
- How many days do you need for Ayodhya darshan? 2 nights / 3 days is ideal for the Ram Mandir and major temples.
- How far is Varanasi from Ayodhya? About 200–230 km, roughly 5–6 hours by road.
- How many days for an Ayodhya Prayagraj Varanasi tour? 5 days / 4 nights is the comfortable, classic trinity yatra.
- Can you arrange VIP / fast-track Ram Mandir darshan? Yes, sugam/suvidha darshan is arranged wherever officially available, plus senior & wheelchair assistance.
- What is the best time to visit Ayodhya? October to March for pleasant weather; Ram Navami and Deepotsav are spectacular but very crowded.
- How do I book? Call/WhatsApp +91 74087 63401, email kashidharshannn@gmail.com, or use the enquiry form at https://kashidharshan.com/contact.html
